/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/browser.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/browser.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/browser.dir/src/dom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/browser.dir/src/layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/browser.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/browser.dir/src/scripting.cpp.o CMakeFiles/browser.dir/src/network.cpp.o -o browser  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL3.so.0.2.10 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblua5.4.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL3_ttf.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL3.so
